category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes sassc as a libsass command line driver.
source_facts.description: Wrapper around libsass that helps to create command-line apps.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README and project title use SassC/sassc naming.
docs_sources: Official sass/sassc repository README includes documentation sections for building and testing.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/sass/sassc; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository describes it as the libsass command line driver.
source_facts.description identifies libsass wrapper and command-line app support.
